attacking_style: Does not typically attack; relies on sustained tempo climbing rather than explosive accelerations. Struggles to follow sharp accelerations on steep gradients (18%+), particularly when ramps exceed his power-to-weight threshold.
team_tactics: Often deployed in breakaways that compromise GC position (Giro 2022), suggesting flexible team role between GC support and stage hunting. Limited high-mountain domestique support visible in observations.
terrain_preference: Moderate gradient climbs where diesel tempo can be sustained. Exposed on ultra-steep ramps (18%+) and when explosive accelerations required. Best suited to grinding efforts rather than punchy finishes.
vulnerability: Cannot respond to sharp accelerations from pure climbers on steep gradients. Power limitations become critical above 18% and on successive steep ramps. Lacks finishing kick when pushed to limit.
key_patterns: Struggles specifically on steepest ramps 18%+ across multiple Grand Tours (2021, 2019)
Unable to follow explosive accelerations from lighter climbers despite strong base tempo (2019, 2018)
Deployed in breakaways suggesting secondary GC role or stage-hunting mandate (2022)
Shows resilience finishing efforts but lacks final acceleration when in contention (2018)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 Giro appearance in breakaway suggests maintained fitness but team tactics indicate stepped back from pure GC contention
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
